## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e:smoke`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Change Risk

- [ ] No schema or env var changes
- [ ] Includes schema or migration changes
- [ ] Includes auth, access control, or middleware changes
- [ ] Includes report, export, or PDF generation changes

## Notes

- Operational impact:
- Follow-up work:
